reviews.comment:
Quedó hermosa la nueva  Full, con todo , wifi , enchufes , lugar cómodo para disfrutar un café riquísimo ☕, la cafetera es un caño  y la atención de Rodrigo un crack.
Muy buena atención de los playeros también. siempre atentos

(Translated by Google)
The new Full is beautiful, with everything: Wi-Fi, power outlets, a comfortable place to enjoy a delicious coffee ☕. The coffee machine is fantastic, and Rodrigo's service is top-notch. The attendants were also very helpful and always attentive.

reviews.comment:
22/02/2026 fui a llenar el tanque, a inflar las cubiertas y pasar al baño para seguir en la ruta. NAFTA no pude cargar por qué solo aceptaban efectivo. El baño estaba Clausurado (? Y el aire me mandaron a una gomería cercana que estaba cerrada. Excelente servicio.

(Translated by Google)
On February 22, 2026, I went to fill up the tank, inflate the tires, and use the restroom before continuing my trip. I couldn't get gas because they only accepted cash. The restroom was closed (?). And for air conditioning, they directed me to a nearby tire shop that was also closed. Excellent service.

reviewReply.comment: Candela, efectivamente es insólita, si fuera habitual las colas de vehículos tendrían una desmesurada extensión. Claramente un hecho eventual ha ocasionado demoras en el expendio de combustibles y desafortunadamente ud. tuvo que sufrir la experiencia. Nuestras disculpas.

reviews.comment:
Vuelvo a editar mi publicación pues no me da la opción que poder opinar.
Cabe mencionar que consulte por los baños internos y nos dijeron que vayamos afuera.
Se consultó, pero nos respondieron que estaban cerrados.
Acá no se trata de responder mensajes de que deberíamos hacer, es una empresa destinada a clientes YPF (ACA) tan difícil no debe ser.

Hoy 11/1/2026 siendo clientes de YPF, decidimos parar para poder tomar un café y comer.
El personal mujer que limpia, me habló de muy mala manera. Quería pasar al baño de mujeres a lo cual ella lo tenía cerrado con llave y que no iba a abrir porque tenía que limpiar. ME DIJO Q ME VAYA A PUMA.
Volví adentro a consumir, cuando volví el baño está cerrado.
Te ponen de excusa que "tenés que pedirle llave al personal que carga combustible" y ellos responden "tenés que pedirle llave adentro"
NO RECOMIENDO GENTEE
Una vergüenza, la señora mayor que limpia y el resto.

(Translated by Google)
I'm editing my post again because I don't have the option to comment.

It's worth mentioning that I asked about the restrooms inside the station and they told us to go outside.
We inquired, but they replied that they were closed. This isn't about responding to messages telling us what to do; it's a company meant for YPF (ACA) customers, it shouldn't be that difficult.

Today, January 11, 2026, as YPF customers, we decided to stop for coffee and food.
The female cleaning staff member spoke to me very rudely. I wanted to use the women's restroom, which she had locked and wouldn't open because she had to clean. SHE TOLD ME TO GO TO PUMA.
I went back inside to buy something, and when I returned, the restroom was closed.
They give you the excuse that "you have to ask the staff who pump the fuel for the key," and they reply, "you have to ask for the key inside."
I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS PLACE.
A disgrace, both the older cleaning lady and the rest of the staff.

reviewReply.comment: Angelina, si consumió dn el Full, este tiene baños internos exclusivos para clientes y socios del ACA. Siempre es recomendable consultar, sobre todo si los baños públicos están cerrados cuando los limpian.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WdWNVRkdZMFZTT1hONFprdFBMVTFUT1hGVFFsRRAB
